message:
feat(web): add useAgentStats hook for per-agent stats tracking

Derives per-agent state, token usage, turn number, and LLM call timing
from session events. Tracks state transitions: idle, calling_llm,
executing_tool, delegating. Accumulates input/output tokens from
llm_end events and streaming token count from llm_chunk events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
